title: T-005 — grns + grn_items tables + multi-LP-per-line invariant (WH §5.5, §7)
prompt:
# T-005 — grns + grn_items tables + multi-LP-per-line invariant (WH §5.5, §7)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §5.5, §7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create GRN header + multi-LP-per-line item table supporting the Q1 user scenario: one PO line produces N grn_items rows (each row = 1 LP with own batch/expiry/pallet/location). System never auto-splits.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `0NN_grns.sql`: `grns(id, org_id, grn_number, source_type ENUM('po','to','return','adjustment_in'), po_id, to_id, asn_id, supplier_id, receipt_date, warehouse_id, default_location_id, status ENUM('draft','completed','cancelled'), received_by, notes, ext_jsonb, private_jsonb, audit cols)`.
2. `grn_items(id, org_id, grn_id, line_number, product_id, po_line_id, to_line_id, ordered_qty, received_qty, uom, batch_number, supplier_batch_number, gtin, catch_weight_kg, manufacture_date, expiry_date, pallet_id, location_id, qa_status_initial, lp_id)`.
3. `UNIQUE(org_id, grn_number)`, `CHECK (received_qty > 0)`.
4. RLS + app.current_org_id() RLS policy on both.
5. Drizzle schemas + Insert/Select types.

## Files
- packages/db/src/schema/grns.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_grns.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/grns.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `\d grns` and `\d grn_items` are inspected, then every §5.5 column exists and RLS is enabled on both.
2. Given a single PO line, when 3 `grn_items` rows are inserted with different `batch_number`/`expiry_date`/`pallet_id`, then all 3 succeed and the schema does not auto-merge them.
3. Given `grn.status='completed'`, when an UPDATE to a grn_items qty is attempted, then it is blocked by a trigger or service-layer guard (V-WH-GRN-001 — schema enforces via status-immutability trigger).
4. Given RLS on, when tenant B reads tenant A's GRNs, then zero rows are returned.

## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/src/schema/grns.test.ts` asserting multi-row insert per po_line_id, RLS, and status-immutability.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test grns`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-split or auto-merge grn_items rows — Q1 explicitly mandates operator-entered per-row qty.
- Do not omit RLS.
- Do not allow `received_qty <= 0`.
- Do not skip status-immutability for completed GRNs.

## Dependencies
- T-001
- T-002

pipeline_inputs.description: Create GRN header + multi-LP-per-line item table supporting the Q1 user scenario: one PO line produces N grn_items rows (each row = 1 LP with own batch/expiry/pallet/location). System never auto-splits.
pipeline_inputs.details: Create GRN header + multi-LP-per-line item table supporting the Q1 user scenario: one PO line produces N grn_items rows (each row = 1 LP with own batch/expiry/pallet/location). System never auto-splits. Migration `0NN_grns.sql`: `grns(id, org_id, grn_number, source_type ENUM('po','to','return','adjustment_in'), po_id, to_id, asn_id, supplier_id, receipt_date, warehouse_id, default_location_id, status ENUM('draft','completed','cancelled'), received_by, notes, ext_jsonb, private_jsonb, audit cols)`. `grn_items(id, org_id, grn_id, line_number, product_id, po_line_id, to_line_id, ordered_qty, received_qty, uom, batch_number, supplier_batch_number, gtin, catch_weight_kg, manufacture_date, expiry_date, pallet_id, location_id, qa_status_initial, lp_id)`. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md`).
out_of_scope: Indexes beyond those needed for FK (deferred T-011)
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration runs, when `\d grns` and `\d grn_items` are inspected, then every §5.5 column exists and RLS is enabled on both.
Given a single PO line, when 3 `grn_items` rows are inserted with different `batch_number`/`expiry_date`/`pallet_id`, then all 3 succeed and the schema does not auto-merge them.

Given `grn.status='completed'`, when an UPDATE to a grn_items qty is attempted, then it is blocked by a trigger or service-layer guard (V-WH-GRN-001 — schema enforces via status-immutability trigger).
Given RLS on, when tenant B reads tenant A's GRNs, then zero rows are returned.
test_strategy: RED: `packages/db/src/schema/grns.test.ts` asserting multi-row insert per po_line_id, RLS, and status-immutability.
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test grns`.
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not use tenant_id as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is org_id. See _meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md.
Do not auto-split or auto-merge grn_items rows — Q1 explicitly mandates operator-entered per-row qty.
Do not skip status-immutability for completed GRNs.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry (fefo_strategy_v1, lp_state_machine_v1), warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy, gs1_prefix
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
